sections.paragraph:
Original: דּמה

Transliteration: dâmâh

Phonetic: daw-maw'

BDB Definition:

  1. to be like, resemble
    1. (Qal) to be like, resemble
    2. (Piel)
      1. to liken, compare
      2. to imagine, think
    3. (Hithpael) to make oneself like
    4. (Niphal)

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 437

Part(s) of speech: Verb
